reviews.comment:
Fui a cargar combustible y aproveché para comer algo en el full. Solo puedo decir cosas buenas tanto del personal de la playa como de la gente que trabaja en el sector de comida. Muy amables y atentos. Los felicito!

(Translated by Google)
I went to fill up my tank and took the opportunity to grab a bite to eat at the full station. I can only say good things about both the gas station staff and the people who work in the food area. Very friendly and attentive. Congratulations!

reviews.comment:
